Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level behavior: current main uses `turnAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` for the post-tool raw assistant guard, and the source PR includes terminal proof of the configured 100 ms path after the patch. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.

target.title: fix(codex): make post-tool raw assistant timeout configurable
target.body:
## Summary

- Replacement for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84135 because the original contributor PR has `maintainerCanModify=false` and is behind current `origin/main`.
- Preserves the original contributor commits and author credit from @rozmiarD.
- Adds `appServer.postToolRawAssistantCompletionIdleTimeoutMs` for the post-tool raw assistant completion guard while keeping existing defaults unchanged.
- Keeps the default-semantics/product question in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/84137 instead of folding it into this conservative config PR.

## Relationship

- Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84135
- Related stack context: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/83222, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/83476, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/84494
- Adjacent but not fixed here: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/84516

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `CI=1 timeout 300s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extensions.config.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/config.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.test.ts -t "post-tool raw assistant|Codex app-server config|raw assistant progress"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Post-tool raw assistant completion after a tool handoff can use a dedicated completion-idle timeout when configured, without changing pre-tool assistant release behavior or default timeout semantics.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout rebased on current `origin/main` at `c49647ee238`; Crabbox/Testbox proof is being run before maintainer handoff.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See Verification above for the focused local regression command. Remote Crabbox/Testbox command output will be posted before this leaves draft state.

Evidence after fix: Focused local regression passed: 2 files passed, 46 tests passed, 184 skipped.

Observed result after fix: The config and post-tool raw assistant regression coverage pass on the rebased branch.

What was not tested: Full changed gate and remote Crabbox/Testbox proof are pending on this draft replacement branch.
target.author: vincentkoc
